text: In the eschatological level of meaning, the first event, regarding the king of Assyria, refers to the first part of the tribulation (2009/2010 to March 29, 30, 31 of 2040), and the last event, regarding the king of Babylon, refers to the second part of the tribulation, which occurs prior to the return of Christ in 2437 A.D.
Road stones were pulled up, in ancient times, to be used in warfare.
This refers, in the eschatological level of meaning, to a drought and famine during the reign of the Antichrist.
